series_vals: Plan to be more active in 2015
87b7sitfbe4ttuns.q: How many restaurant types have smaller difference between currently-active and currently-inactive share of respondents than 1.0?
87b7sitfbe4ttuns.e:
1. Get the summation of currently-active(very active, somewhat active) share of respondents and currently-inactive(not active, plan to be more active in 2015) share of respondents for every restaurant type.
2. Calculate the difference between those two values.
3. Count the restaurant types which has smaller difference than 1.0.
